title: AWS Bedrock AgentCore 平台核心组件 OpenAPI 梳理（2026-06-04）
h1: AWS Bedrock AgentCore 平台核心组件 OpenAPI 梳理（2026-06-04）

callout.p: 结论：AgentCore 不是一个单体 Agent API，而是一组可独立使用、也可组合编排的控制面和数据面服务。公开 API 可以按 Runtime、Memory、Gateway、Identity、Browser、Code Interpreter、Evaluations、Payments、Policy、Registry、Harness 分层整理；Gateway 的实际调用面是 MCP endpoint，不应伪造成普通 REST path。

whiteboard:
flowchart LR Client[SDK / CLI / Console] --> CP[Control Plane
bedrock-agentcore-control] Client --> DP[Data Plane
bedrock-agentcore] Agent[MCP Client / Agent Runtime] --> GP[Gateway Data Plane
gateway URL] CP --> Runtime[Runtime / Harness] CP --> Memory[Memory] CP --> Gateway[Gateway / Targets / Rules] CP --> Identity[Identity / Token Vault] CP --> Tools[Browser / Code Interpreter] CP --> Gov[Policy / Registry / Evaluations / Payments] DP --> RuntimeInvoke[Invoke Runtime / Harness] DP --> MemoryEvents[Events / Records / Extraction] DP --> ToolInvoke[Browser / Code Sessions] DP --> EvalRun[Evaluation Jobs / A/B Tests] GP --> ToolsList[tools/list] GP --> ToolsCall[tools/call]

tr.td: 按 AWS API Reference 的 method/path/request/response 直接整理
运行调用、事件、记忆检索、工具会话、评测任务
普通 JSON/Binary API 可表达；streaming/binary 需扩展说明
官方未展开为普通 REST operation；以 MCP endpoint 契约表达
MCP tools/list、tools/call 通过 gateway URL 执行；IAM 中有 InvokeGateway 权限动作
evaluator CRUD、online config CRUD、configuration bundle、policy/eval 资源
Evaluate、batch evaluation start/get/list/stop/delete、A/B test CRUD、recommendation start/get/list/delete

pre.code: paths: /runtimes/: put: operationId: CreateAgentRuntime summary: Create an AgentCore Runtime /runtimes/{agentRuntimeId}: get: operationId: GetAgentRuntime put: operationId: UpdateAgentRuntime delete: operationId: DeleteAgentRuntime /runtimes/{agentRuntimeArn}/invocations: post: operationId: InvokeAgentRuntime parameters: - name: accountId in: query - name: qualifier in: query - name: X-Amzn-Bedrock-AgentCore-Runtime-Session-Id in: header - name: X-Amzn-Bedrock-AgentCore-Runtime-User-Id in: header requestBody: content: application/octet-stream: {} application/json: {} x-agentcore-note: streaming and binary payload require SDK/HTTP adapter handling

paths: /memories/create: post: operationId: CreateMemory /memories/{memoryId}/events: post: operationId: CreateEvent /memories/{memoryId}/retrieve: post: operationId: RetrieveMemoryRecords /memories/{memoryId}/memoryRecords: get: operationId: ListMemoryRecords /memories/{memoryId}/memoryRecords/batch: post: operationId: BatchCreateMemoryRecords

paths: /gateways/: post: operationId: CreateGateway get: operationId: ListGateways /gateways/{gatewayIdentifier}/targets/: post: operationId: CreateGatewayTarget /gateways/{gatewayIdentifier}/synchronizeTargets: put: operationId: SynchronizeGatewayTargets x-agentcore-gateway-data-plane: endpoint: https://{gatewayId}.gateway.bedrock-agentcore.{region}.amazonaws.com protocol: MCP operations: - tools/list - tools/call note: API Reference does not expose these as ordinary REST paths.

paths: /browsers/{browserId}/sessions/start: put: operationId: StartBrowserSession /browsers/{browserId}/sessions/invoke: post: operationId: InvokeBrowser /code-interpreters/{codeInterpreterId}/sessions/start: put: operationId: StartCodeInterpreterSession /code-interpreters/{codeInterpreterId}/tools/invoke: post: operationId: InvokeCodeInterpreter

tr.td: 多数 Control plane 和 Memory/Browser/Code session API 可直接表达
InvokeAgentRuntime、Browser stream、Code Interpreter 异步任务需要额外说明
独立协议说明 + gateway URL
不要将 tools/list、tools/call 写成官方 REST path
必须有 operationId；复杂 oneOf/anyOf/allOf、callbacks、webhooks、复杂参数序列化不适合作为第一版目标
当前公开文档强调 RestJson 和基础 HTTP binding；streaming/custom protocol 不宜纳入首版

ul.li: 常规 AWS API 使用 IAM/SigV4；Runtime 和 Gateway 可配置 inbound authorizer，例如 AWS IAM、JWT、自定义认证或仅认证模式。
创建 Runtime、Gateway、Memory、Browser、Code Interpreter、Evaluations 等资源常涉及 iam:PassRole。
Identity 负责 workload identity、token vault、OAuth2/API key/payment credential provider，支撑 agent 以工作负载或最终用户身份访问外部系统。
Gateway outbound auth 可以复用 Identity credential provider；这比在工具 schema 或 agent prompt 中散落密钥更适合企业治理。
Service Authorization Reference 暴露了大量 condition keys，可按 runtime authorizer、gateway authorizer、actor/session/user、network、KMS、JWT claim 进行细粒度授权。

whiteboard: sequenceDiagram participant Dev as Developer participant CP as AgentCore Control Plane participant Id as Identity participant Rt as Runtime participant Mem as Memory participant Gw as Gateway participant Obs as CloudWatch / OTEL Dev->>Id: CreateWorkloadIdentity Dev->>CP: CreateAgentRuntime CP->>Rt: provision runtime and endpoint Dev->>Gw: CreateGateway and targets Dev->>Mem: CreateMemory with strategies Dev->>Rt: InvokeAgentRuntime Rt->>Mem: CreateEvent / RetrieveMemoryRecords Rt->>Gw: MCP tools/list and tools/call Rt->>Obs: traces / logs / metrics Rt-->>Dev: streaming or final response

li.a: Actions - Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Data Plane
Actions - Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Control Plane
Actions, resources, and condition keys for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
Amazon Bedrock AgentCore endpoints and quotas
AWS SDK Go v2 bedrockagentcore generated.json
AWS SDK Go v2 bedrockagentcorecontrol generated.json
